name: PowerColor Red Devil RX 6900 XT 16GB Gaming Graphic Card
description: PowerColor Red Devil RX 6900 XT 16GB Gaming Graphic Card What is PowerColor Red Devil RX 6900 XT 16GB Gaming Graphic Card price in Pakistan? PowerColor Red Devil RX 6900 XT 16GB Gaming Graphic Card price in Pakistan is Rs.175,000. It features 5120 stream processors with boost clock up to 2340 MHz and 16GB GDDR6 memory on a 256-bit interface for outstanding 4K gaming performance. Built on PCIe 4.0 with HDMI 2.1 and DisplayPort 1.4 outputs, it supports DirectX 12 and AMD technologies like Eyefinit
